header_normalization: trim, collapse internal whitespace/newlines to a single space, uppercase
source_file_reference: Same column template as Pepe's PEPE BIHAR DSR REPORT 2026.xlsb, sheet 'PEPE DSR- 2026' -- no distinct Pepe Kids sample file inspected yet, confirmed with client 2026-07-18 that the export format is identical to menswear. Onboarded as a genuinely distinct brand (own DimBrand row, own (brand, product_line) config), not a second product_line under the existing PEPE brand: the client confirmed a store selling both Pepe menswear and Pepe Kids uses a DIFFERENT store code for the Kids side, same convention as Killer vs Junior Killer -- store codes are unique only within a brand, so a shared store network would mean a shared brand, but this one doesn't share codes.

financial_year.reason: Assumed identical to Pepe menswear's derivation (same file template, no FY column) -- confirm once a real Pepe Kids file is available; if it turns out to supply financial_year directly, this derived_fields entry should simply be removed rather than left silently unused.
financial_year.parse: MONTH is formatted '<MONTH NAME>- <YYYY>', e.g. 'JANUARY- 2026', same as Pepe menswear
financial_year.rule: financial_year (Apr-Mar) of the parsed month/year; Jan/Feb/Mar YYYY -> FY (YYYY-1)-YYYY, Apr..Dec YYYY -> FY YYYY-(YYYY+1)
financial_year.output_format: YY-YY+1 (2-digit-2-digit, matching Killer's supplied convention, e.g. '25-26')

validation_rules.is_return_when: quantity < 0 OR mrp_value < 0 (assumed same convention as Pepe menswear)
validation_rules.divide_by_zero_guard: if mrp_value == 0, discount_pct is null, not an error
notes: This config is a direct copy of pepe_menswear.json's column mapping -- client-confirmed 2026-07-18 the export template is identical. The only confirmed difference from Pepe menswear is the brand/store-code namespace (own DimBrand, distinct store codes even for a store shared with Pepe menswear).

Not yet verified against a real Pepe Kids file (unlike Kraus, which was built from an actual sample) -- treat every column-mapping assumption here as inherited-and-unconfirmed until a real file is uploaded. If real data reveals a different header vocabulary or a genuinely supplied financial_year, update this config the same way any other brand's mapping gets corrected once real data is seen, not by guessing further.
WAD is stored as a fraction (e.g. 0.30007...) not a percentage, same as Pepe menswear -- multiply by 100 before comparing to computed discount_pct (fraction_to_percent cast already does this).
BillNo is expected mixed-type (mostly text, occasionally a bare number) same as Pepe menswear -- always cast to string, never numeric.

Client-confirmed 2026-07-18 (same rule as every other brand): a blank NET SALE PRICE or ACTUAL DISC cell means 0, not a missing/invalid row -- defaulted via default_if_blank rather than rejected as a required-field error.
